title: [DOCS] Missing `manifest` option in api docs for `/libpod/build`
body:
Coming from [this](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/issues/592#issuecomment-3347315381) issue, it was mentioned that there is no `manifest` option in the API docs for `/libpod/build` endpoint.

I didn't check if the option is supported for other endpoints too and if it's missing elsewhere.
